title: 전치사 before, after, for, during, until, by

stages.concept:
# Unit 091: 전치사 (시간) before, after, for, during, until, by - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 시간의 전치사 **before, after, for, during, until, by**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **before** — ~전에

> Come home **before** 10 o'clock.
> 10시 전에 집에 와라.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **after** — ~후에

> Let's meet **after** school.
> 방과 후에 만나자.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **for** — ~동안 (기간의 길이)

> I have studied English **for** three years.
> 나는 3년 동안 영어를 공부해왔다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **during** — ~하는 동안 (특정 기간)

> I fell asleep **during** the movie.
> 나는 영화를 보는 동안 잠이 들었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: for은 **숫자(기간의 길이)**, during은 **특정 명사(기간의 이름)**와 함께 써요.

> **for** 3 hours / **for** 2 weeks / **for** a long time
> **during** the summer / **during** the class / **during** the vacation

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 고르세요.**
"I stayed in London (       ) two weeks." (나는 2주 동안 런던에 머물렀다.)
1. since
2. during
3. for ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: **until (= till)** — ~까지 (계속)

> I will wait **until** 5 o'clock.
> 나는 5시까지 기다릴 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **by** — ~까지 (기한/마감)

> Please finish it **by** Friday.
> 금요일까지 그것을 끝내세요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: until은 **계속**, by는 **마감**이에요!

🧑‍🎓 학생: for(기간 길이), during(특정 기간), until(계속), by(마감)! 잘 구별할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 091: 전치사(시간) before, after, for, during, until, by - 연습문제 A

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
방과 후에 나를 데리러 올 수 있어요?
Can you pick me up (     ) school?
> **정답** after

---

**02.** 저녁 식사 전에 손을 씻어라.
Wash your hands (     ) dinner.
> **정답** before

---

**03.** 나는 두 시간 동안 공부했다.
I studied (     ) two hours.
> **정답** for

---

**04.** 방학 동안 여행을 갔다.
I went on a trip (     ) vacation.
> **정답** during

---

**05.** 엄마가 올 때까지 기다려라.
Wait (     ) mom comes.
> **정답** until

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I studied during three hours.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** during → for

---

**07.** She arrived after lunch time.
("점심 전에 도착했다")
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** after → before

---

**08.** I waited by 5 o'clock.
(5시까지 계속 기다렸다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** by → until

---

**09.** Finish the report until Friday.
(금요일까지 = 기한)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** until → by

---

**10.** I slept for the movie.
(영화 상영 중에 잠들었다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → during

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
수업이 끝난 후에 만나자.
Let's meet class.
> **정답** after

---

**12.** 시험 전에 복습해라.
Review the exam.
> **정답** before

---

**13.** 나는 30분 동안 운동했다.
I exercised 30 minutes.
> **정답** for

---

**14.** 수업 중에 떠들지 마라.
Don't talk class.
> **정답** during

---

**15.** 금요일까지 보고서를 제출해라.
Submit the report Friday.
> **정답** by

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 한 시간 동안 기다렸다.
waited I for one hour
> **정답** I / waited / for / one / hour

---

**17.** 점심 전에 손을 씻어라.
Wash hands your before lunch
> **정답** Wash / your / hands / before / lunch

---

**18.** 방학 동안 책을 많이 읽었다.
read I many books during vacation
> **정답** I / read / many / books / during / vacation

---

**19.** 내일까지 숙제를 끝내라.
Finish homework your by tomorrow
> **정답** Finish / your / homework / by / tomorrow

---

**20.** 비가 그칠 때까지 기다리자.
Let's until wait the rain stops
> **정답** Let's / wait / until / the / rain / stops
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 091: 전치사(시간) before, after, for, during, until, by - 연습문제 B

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom은 잠자리에 들기 전에 샤워를 했다.
Tom took a shower __________ going to bed.
before
after
by
around
> **정답** before

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy는 방과 후 친구들과 놀았다.
Amy played with her friends _________ school.
by
after
before
around
> **정답** after

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom은 두 시간 동안 방을 치웠다.
Tom cleaned his room __________ two hours.
for
by
during
until
> **정답** for

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He will learn water skiing __________ summer
vacation.
He is going abroad to learn English __________ a
month.
by - until
during - for
for - during
until - by
> **정답** during - for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I will finish my homework __________ nine o'clock.
I will study English __________ twelve o'clock.
until - for
for- during
during - for
by - until
> **정답** by - until

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You have to hand in the report for tomorrow.
She lived in London until 2021.
You must arrive at school before 9 o'clock.
He will arrive at home before three o'clock.
> **정답** You have to hand in the report for tomorrow.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
It snowed a lot during the winter.
She was away for two days.
He was injured for the trip.
She took a rest during the day.
> **정답** He was injured for the trip.

---

**08.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를
고르시오.
A: When does he leave?
B: He will stay here __________ tomorrow.
from
by
for
until
> **정답** until

---

**09.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를
고르시오.
A: How long have you been playing computer games?
B: I've been playing computer games __________ 30
minutes.
for
until
during
by
> **정답** for

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
He will work at Starbucks during this month.
before
for
until
by
> **정답** until

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
The classroom was very quiet for the test.
on
during
by
in
> **정답** during

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She finished the interview by three o'clock.
The work must be done until today.
The letter will arrive until Thursday.
He will post the article on the Internet until
5:00.
> **정답** She finished the interview by three o'clock.

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
우리는 학교가 끝난 후 카페에서 만나기로 약속했다.
We promised to meet at the café _________ school.
by
after
during
until
> **정답** after

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 공통으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I stayed at my grandmother's home __________ last
Sunday.
They played soccer __________ 2 o'clock.
during
by
for
until
> **정답** until

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 공통으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Tom went on a trip _________ the holiday.
Amy felt happy __________ the volunteer work.
during
until
for
by
> **정답** during

---

**16.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리는 지금까지 그 소식을 듣지 못했다.
We've not heard the news until now.
We've not heard the news by now.
We've not heard the news before now.
We've not heard the news for now.
> **정답** We've not heard the news until now.

---

**17.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 저녁식사 후에 나의 개와 산책을 했다.
I took a walk with my dog before dinner.
I took a walk with my dog until dinner.
I took a walk with my dog after dinner.
I took a walk with my dog around dinner.
> **정답** I took a walk with my dog after dinner.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They have to board the plane
until seven o 'clock.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• board (비행기
> **정답** until → by

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They ate food from many
countries for the festival.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → during

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She lived in London by 2021.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** by → until (in)
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 091 전치사(시간) before, after, for, during, until, by중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 전치사 중 알맞은 것을 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
[for, during]
Ann traveled in Europe  (     )  two weeks.
정답 for

---

**02.** 주어진 전치사 중 알맞은 것을 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
[until, by]
I will study for the final exam  (     )  midnight.
정답 until

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
James는 밥 먹기전에 손을 씻는다.
James washes his hands  (     )  meals.
정답 before

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
Lisa은 내일 오전 10시 전에 서점에 갈 예정이다.
Lisa is going to go to the bookstore  (     )  10
a.m. tomorrow.
정답 before

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
그는 휴가를 보낸 후 감기에 걸렸다.
He caught a cold  (     )  vacation.
정답 after

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 넣으시오.
너는 5시까지 공항에 도착해야 한다.
You have to arrive at the airport  (     )  5 o'clock.
정답 by

---

**07.** 주어진 전치사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[for, during]
A: What are you going to do  (     )  the summer
vacation?
B: I am going to stay in Jeju Island  (     )  two
weeks.
정답 during, for

---

**08.** 주어진 전치사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[until, by]
A: When can I use this ticket?
B: You can use this ticket  (     )  this month.
정답 until

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Amy는 식사 후 약을 먹어야 한다.
Youa should take medicine [before]  each meal.
정답 after

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
그 팀은 경기 전 준비운동을 했다.
The team warmed up [during]  the game.
정답 before

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 091: 전치사 - 변형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom은 잠자리에 들기 전에 책을 읽었다.
Tom read a book __________ going to bed. before after by around
> 정답: before

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy는 수업 후 친구들과 놀았다.
Amy played with her friends _________ class. by after before around
> 정답: after

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom은 세 시간 동안 방을 정리했다.
Tom organized his room __________ three hours. for by during until
> 정답: for

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He will learn snowboarding __________ winter vacation.
He is going abroad to learn French __________ a month. by - until during - for for - during until - by
> 정답: during - for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I will finish my project __________ ten o'clock.
I will study math __________ eleven o'clock. until - for for- during during - for by - until
> 정답: by - until

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You have to hand in the essay for tomorrow.
She lived in Tokyo until 2022.
You must arrive at school before 8 o'clock.
He will arrive at home before four o'clock.
> 정답: You have to hand in the essay for tomorrow.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
It rained a lot during the spring.
She was away for three days.
He was injured for the trip.
She took a nap during the afternoon.
> 정답: He was injured for the trip.

---

**08.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
A: When does she leave?
B: She will stay here __________ Friday. from by for until
> 정답: until

---

**09.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
A: How long have you been reading books?
B: I've been reading books __________ 40 minutes. for until during by
> 정답: for

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
She will work at the café during this week. before for until by
> 정답: until

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
The library was very quiet for the exam. on during by in
> 정답: during

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She finished the report by four o'clock.
The task must be done until today.
The package will arrive until Wednesday.
He will upload the video until 6:00.
> 정답: She finished the report by four o'clock.

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
우리는 수업이 끝난 후 카페에서 만나기로 약속했다.
We promised to meet at the café _________ class. by after during until
> 정답: after

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 공통으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I stayed at my friend's house __________ last Friday.
They played basketball __________ 3 o'clock. during by for until
> 정답: until

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 공통으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Tom went on a trip _________ the break.
Amy felt excited __________ the festival. during until for by
> 정답: during

---

**16.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리는 지금까지 그 결과를 듣지 못했다.
We've not heard the result until now.
We've not heard the result by now.
We've not heard the result before now.
We've not heard the result for now.
> 정답: We've not heard the result until now.

---

**17.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 아침식사 후에 나의 고양이와 산책을 했다.
I took a walk with my cat before breakfast.
I took a walk with my cat until breakfast.
I took a walk with my cat after breakfast.
I took a walk with my cat around breakfast.
> 정답: I took a walk with my cat after breakfast.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. They  have  to  board  the  bus until  eight  o  'clock. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: until → by

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. They  tried  food  from  many countries  for  the  event. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: for → during

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. She  lived  in  Tokyo  by  2022. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: by → until (in)
